message:
fix: Wrap all async host imports in try-catch to prevent WASM crashes

Previously, exceptions from CF bindings (KV, R2, D1), fetch(), JSON.parse(),
or tcp_connect() would propagate through Asyncify and crash the entire WASM
instance. Now each async host import catches errors and returns -1, which
the C extension translates to Python OSError for graceful handling.

Wrapped: tcp_connect, http_fetch, kv_get, kv_put, kv_delete, r2_get,
r2_put, d1_exec, thread_join.
